trace.summary: Resolved audited security and delivery defects across backend, frontend, and tests for appeals, withdrawals, encryption, integrity reporting, and engagement tracking.
changes: Enforced object-level authorization on appeal creation so members can only appeal accessible orders and order-linked comments, while privileged roles retain elevated access.
Restricted withdrawal eligibility and creation to approved group leaders and privileged finance/admin roles, with explicit leader eligibility validation and 403 handling.
Removed the unsafe hardcoded-at-rest encryption fallback and required environment-backed key configuration for protected data handling.
Added checksum-based integrity verification for stored appeal files and exposed integrity status in the appeal status UI.
Implemented missing server/client behavior instrumentation for favorites, order and discussion impressions, votes, and thread review completion.
Added group leader self-service withdrawal UX and API coverage on the frontend.
Expanded backend and frontend tests to cover the new authorization, eligibility, telemetry, and API-client behaviors, and repaired test harness issues.
